title: Cave Escape
description: Navigate a dangerous cave while avoiding enemies. Progress through five escalating levels to escape to freedom. Use arrow keys to move and reach the glowing exit portal before you run out of health. Master the dash mechanic (X button) - Level 4 teaches tight corridor navigation while Level 5 presents expert rapid-dash challenges.
tester_notes: Extended to 5 levels. Level 4 is dash tutorial with tight corridors (3 enemies, slower). Level 5 is expert challenge with 5 rapid enemies at normal speed. Target completion rate 70%+ with adaptive difficulty scaling.
